PROBATE ACCOUNTING STATUS PETITION
Off Calendar Mar-28-2017 Continued To Apr-18-17 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing Re Distribution Of Reserve
Off Calendar Mar-08-2017 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Michael Mandel appeared on his own behalf, and for Richard Canatella.

Mr. Mandel stated that he had been informed that the prior hearing date of February 22 was a compliance date only, and when he filed the Probate Status Report on February 21 he erroneously thoght the February 22 date would be taken off calendar. He apologized for his non-appearance due to this mix-up. He stated that the hearing on the Probate Status Report has been set for March 28, 2017. The Court ordered that the Status Hearing and the Order to Appear be taken off calendar.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Craig Blackstone. Court Examiner: Sandy Hilton. Bailiff: Deputy Jaime. (Not reported)

ORDER OF STATUS HEARING
Off Calendar Mar-08-2017 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing Re Distribution Of Reserve
Off Calendar Feb-22-2017 Continued To Mar-08-17 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

An Order to Appear will be issued to the Attorney to appear on March 8, 2017 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 to explain why he failed to appear and why he failed to report on status of distribution of the reserve. The status hearing is also continued to that date.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Court Examiner: Sandy Hilton. Clerk: Rosie Noguera/Nancy Wong. Deputy: A. Jaime. Not reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing Re Distribution Of Reserve
Off Calendar Feb-01-2017 Continued To Feb-22-17 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Aug-08-2016 Granted Per Written Order

ORDER OF STATUS HEARING
Off Calendar Jul-25-2016 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Richard Canatella for (administrator) Michael Mandel.

The Court asked counsel if he had additional argument regarding the examiner's notes. Mr. Canatella stated that when they received the notes they filed a return addressing every point in the notes. The Court asked if counsel had anything additional regarding the $1100.00 for post death services. Mr. Canatella responded that they did an accounting and that the issue is law vs. equity. The accounting petition was taken under submission. The Order to Appear is off calendar.

Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Rosado. (Not Reported)

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Jun-27-2016 Continued To Jul-25-16 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

The Court stated that it is 9:50 a.m. and there is no appearance. An Order to Appear will be issued to the personal representative Michael Mande and the Attorney Richard Canatella to appear on July 25, 2016 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 to explain why the responses to the examiner's notes have not been filed. The status hearing is also continued to that date.

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Boncato. (Not Reported)
